commits: fix(extraction): add 'statement of operations' income-section pattern + annual report URL overrides
history.notes: Two-pronged fix: (1) data/ticker.json — replaced the quarterly SAND.ST override URL with the 2024 annual report; added direct Cision/CDN PDF URLs for LUMI, SWED-A, BEIJ-B, VOLCAR-B (media-downloads), and expanded SINCH from bare string to full object with PDF URL. (2) src/extraction/field-extractor.ts — added 'consolidated statements? of operations' and 'statements? of operations and comprehensive income' to INCOME_STATEMENT_PATTERNS, enabling EBIT extraction from North-American-format annual reports (Lundin Mining pattern). All 87 tests pass; no rescrape this iteration (rescrape needed to measure partialAfter).

commits: fix(extraction): Swedish IFRS income patterns, narrative employee labels + annual URL overrides iter2
history.notes: Four-cluster fix: (1) field-extractor.ts INCOME_STATEMENT_PATTERNS — added 'rapport over totalresultat' and 'rapport over det samlade resultatet' for Swedish IFRS format (different from iter1 English statement-of-operations fix); (2) field-extractor.ts findNarrativeEmployeeHit — added N medarbetare, N anställda, hade N anställda, employs N people patterns; added Swedish space-thousands separator support (1 254 -> 1254); also fixed the number-parser to strip spaces/NBSP; (3) post-download-checks.ts hasIncomeStatement — added statements-of-operations and rapport-over-totalresultat; (4) data/ticker.json — GETI-B English FY2024 annual report URL (replacing failing Swedish FY2025); SHB-A FY2024 annual report; HACK expanded from string to object with FY2025 annual report; SYSR FY2024/25 annual report; LATO-B manualHeadlineFields.ceo='Johan Hjertonsson'. All 42 test suites / 200 tests pass.

blocked.reason: Investment companies (companyType=investment_company) skip EBIT extraction by design — operating profit includes unrealised portfolio revaluations not comparable to industrial EBIT. CEO set via manualHeadlineFields; EBIT remains null until a manual numeric override is added.
